descriptions: The Iamonte are allies of the Moscato.
edges.evidence_quote: Sono alleati dei Moscato.

descriptions: Zaza is a Camorra clan leader who strengthened ties with the Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: La camorra sfrutta la città come base strategica e rafforza i legami con esponenti della criminalità locale, come Michele Zaza

descriptions: Zaza and Bardellino cooperated in cocaine distribution.
edges.evidence_quote: I boss della camorra Zaza e Bardellino la distribuiscono in Francia, Italia e Spagna.

descriptions: Zaza cooperated with Bardellino, who led the Casalesi.
edges.evidence_quote: I boss della camorra Zaza e Bardellino la distribuiscono in Francia, Italia e Spagna.

descriptions: Giuliano and Zaza clans were both members of the Nuova Famiglia alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: The clash ... led to the formation of the Nuova Famiglia, consisting particularly of the Giuliano clan, the Zaza clan, then headed by Michele Zaza, the Nuvoletta clan and the Casalesi clan

descriptions: The Mazzarella clan was founded by the Zaza clan in the 1940s and later taken over by the Mazzarella brothers.
edges.evidence_quote: Fondata dagli Zaza negli anni '40 e poi passata sotto il controllo dei fratelli Mazzarella

descriptions: Zaza is a branch of the Mazzarella family.
edges.evidence_quote: Esistono inoltre gli Zaza, del quartiere Fuorigrotta, ramo della famiglia Mazzarella.

descriptions: Mazzarella clan originated as a branch of the Zaza clan.
edges.evidence_quote: The clan was founded in the 1960s by the Mazzarella brothers, Ciro known as 'o Scellone, Gennaro and Vincenzo, as a branch of the Zaza clan, then headed by the historical boss Michele Zaza, who was a relative of the Mazzarella brothers.

descriptions: The NCO fought against Zaza and other entrepreneurial cartels.
time_periods: fine di questo decennio e i primissimi anni di quello successivo (late 1970s-early 1980s)
edges.evidence_quote: Gli scontri tra NCO e cartelli “imprenditoriali” (Zaza, Nuvoletta, Bardellino e alleati)

descriptions: Nuova Famiglia allied with the Zaza clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Successivamente la FN si alleò alle cosche e ai boss vicini alla mafia siciliana, tra cui ... Michele Zaza

descriptions: The Zaza clan was part of the Nuova Famiglia confederation.
edges.evidence_quote: The confederation included: - Michele Zaza, boss of the powerful Zaza clan

Bloque Metro de las AUC.description: Colombian paramilitary front operating primarily in Antioquia department, founded in 1996 by Carlos Mauricio García Fernández (alias 'Rodrigo Doble Cero'). It was part of the ACCU and later the AUC, fighting leftist guerrillas and involved in drug trafficking. The group was dissolved in 2004.

descriptions: Bloque Metro is listed as an enemy of AUC in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: FARC-EP , ELN , Disidencias del EPL , ACC , Bloque Metro (Disidencia de AUC)

descriptions: AUC is listed as an enemy of Bloque Metro from 2002 in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia (Desde 2002)

descriptions: Bloque Metro was later linked to AUC.
edges.evidence_quote: Estaba vinculado a las Autodefensas Campesinas de Córdoba y Urabá (ACCU) y posteriormente a las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia (AUC)

descriptions: Bloque Metro was later linked to AUC as part of its structure.
edges.evidence_quote: Estaba vinculado a las Autodefensas Campesinas de Córdoba y Urabá (ACCU) y posteriormente a las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia (AUC)

descriptions: Bloque Metro subcontracted the Banda de la Terraza for operations.
edges.evidence_quote: el Bloque Metro desarrolló una modalidad de subcontratación con organizaciones criminales de alta capacidad operativa, como la banda de la Terraza

descriptions: Bloque Cacique Nutibara fought and subdued Bloque Metro.
edges.evidence_quote: Sus más de 1000 integrantes fueron combatidos y luego sometidos por el Bloque Cacique Nutibara al mando de Don Berna.

descriptions: Members of Bloque Metro joined BCN in 2003.
edges.evidence_quote: Parte de los integrantes del Bloque Metro de las AUC, terminó en las filas del BCN, iniciando el año 2003.

descriptions: Surviving members of Bloque Metro demobilized with Bloque Cacique Nutibara or later with other blocs.
edges.evidence_quote: Los miembros sobrevivientes del Bloque Metro que no se desmovilizaron con el Bloque Cacique Nutibara lo hicieron luego con el Bloque Central Bolívar o el Bloque Héroes de Granada.

descriptions: Bloque Central Bolívar joined a military campaign to exterminate Bloque Metro.
edges.evidence_quote: Salvatore Mancuso ... Don Berna ... Carlos Mario Jiménez 'Macaco' ... dueños del Bloque Central Bolívar ... comenzaron una cruzada militar para exterminar al Bloque Metro

descriptions: Surviving members of Bloque Metro demobilized with Bloque Central Bolívar.
edges.evidence_quote: Los miembros sobrevivientes del Bloque Metro que no se desmovilizaron con el Bloque Cacique Nutibara lo hicieron luego con el Bloque Central Bolívar o el Bloque Héroes de Granada.

descriptions: Surviving members of Bloque Metro demobilized with Bloque Héroes de Granada.
edges.evidence_quote: Los miembros sobrevivientes del Bloque Metro que no se desmovilizaron con el Bloque Cacique Nutibara lo hicieron luego con el Bloque Central Bolívar o el Bloque Héroes de Granada.

descriptions: ELN is listed as an enemy of Bloque Metro in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Ejército de Liberación Nacional

edges.target: Peasant Self-Defenders of Córdoba and Urabá
descriptions: Bloque Metro was linked to and part of ACCU.
edges.evidence_quote: Estaba vinculado a las Autodefensas Campesinas de Córdoba y Urabá (ACCU) y posteriormente a las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia (AUC)

edges.target: Peasant Self-Defenders of Córdoba and Urabá
descriptions: Bloque Metro was linked to ACCU as part of its structure.
edges.evidence_quote: Estaba vinculado a las Autodefensas Campesinas de Córdoba y Urabá (ACCU) y posteriormente a las Autodefensas Unidas de Colombia (AUC)

edges.target: Battle Row Ladies' Social and Athletic Club
descriptions: The Battle Row Ladies' Social and Athletic Club was an ally of the Gopher Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Battle Row Ladies' Social and Athletic Club , Parlor Mob , Gorillas , Rhodes Gang

descriptions: Listed as an ally in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bugs and Meyer Gang

descriptions: Bizzarro clan listed as ally in infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Bizzarro clan

descriptions: Citarella clan was part of the anti-Cutolo alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Altre famiglie coinvolte nell'ampia alleanza anticutoliana furono ... i Citarella di Nocera Inferiore

descriptions: Sackett St Boys was a constituent gang that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the gangs that made up the original South Brooklyn Boys were the South Brooklyn Devils, the Garfield Place Boys, the SB Angels, SB Diapers, the Wanderers, the Degraw St boys, the Sackett St Boys, the Butler Gents, the Gowanus Boys, the Kane St. Midgets, The Little Gents, and the Young Savages.

descriptions: The Mau Maus killed a member of the Sand Street Angels, an enemy gang.
edges.evidence_quote: shot and killed Anthony Lavonchino, a member of the Sand Street Angels, one of the Mau Maus' enemies

descriptions: Bloody Tubs were allied with Rip Raps.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Plug Uglies, Rip Raps, Nativists, Dead Rabbits

descriptions: Plug Uglies and Rip Raps jointly participated in the 1856 Baltimore election riot.
edges.evidence_quote: Together with the Rip Raps, they were also actively involved in deadly rioting at the October 1856 municipal election in Baltimore

descriptions: Santa Monica 13 considers Sotel 13 a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: 18th Street gang , Culver City Boys , Venice 13 , Venice Shoreline Crips , Grave Yard Gangster Crips , Sotel 13

descriptions: The Renzvillo crime family formed alliances with 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: The Renzvillo mafia family has allegedly set up alliances with the 'Ndrangheta and Camorra.

descriptions: The Renzvillo crime family formed alliances with Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: The Renzvillo mafia family has allegedly set up alliances with the 'Ndrangheta and Camorra.

descriptions: The Altamura and Formicola clans fought a very violent conflict lasting years.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra gli Altamura e i Formicola : conflitto violentissimo durato anni svoltosi nel territorio di San Giovanni a Teduccio

descriptions: Egyptian Islamic Jihad merged with al-Qaeda in the mid-1990s.
edges.evidence_quote: the merger of the overseas branch of Egypt's Al-Jihad, which was led by Ayman al-Zawahiri, with the groups bin Laden brought under his control after his return to Afghanistan in the mid-1990s.

descriptions: PIJ's founders established a branch of Egyptian Islamic Jihad before forming PIJ.
edges.evidence_quote: establish Islamic Jihad-Shaqaqi Faction, a branch of the Egyptian Islamic Jihad

'Ndrina Ursino.description: The Ursino are a powerful 'ndrina of the 'Ndrangheta based in Gioiosa Jonica, Calabria, Italy. They are allied with the Aquino, Cordì, and Belfiore clans and have operations in Turin, Liguria, France, Spain, Canada, and England. The clan was involved in the construction of the Port of Gioia Tauro, the murder of anti-mafia activist Rocco Gatto, and the assassination of magistrate Bruno Caccia. They are still active, with recent operations targeting their drug trafficking networks.

descriptions: Ursino 'ndrina is a clan of 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: In February 2014, both FBI and Italian Police joint operation named New Bridge, intercepted the transatlantic network of U.S. and Italian crime families. The raid targeted the Gambino and Bonanno families in the U.S. while in Italy, it targeted the Ursino 'ndrina from Gioiosa Jonica.

descriptions: Belfiore forms alliances with Ursino-Macrì in Turin.
edges.evidence_quote: A Torino stringono alleanze con gli Ursino -Macrì.

descriptions: Belfiore and Ursino jointly ordered the murder of magistrate Bruno Caccia.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 26 giugno 1983 fanno uccidere insieme agli Ursino a Torino il magistrato Bruno Caccia.

descriptions: Ursino 'ndrina is listed as an ally of Cordì 'ndrina.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Commisso 'ndrina , Aquino 'ndrina, Ursino 'ndrina

descriptions: The Ursino are listed as allies of the Costa.
edges.evidence_quote: Alleati: Ursino

descriptions: The Papalia (as Barbaro-Papalia) were involved in drug trafficking alongside the Ursino-Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: operazione "Tamburo", iniziata nel 2009 che ha portato all'arresto per traffico di droga di 13 persone, presunte affiliate ai Mancuso , Barbaro-Papalia e agli Ursino - Macrì .

descriptions: Belfiore are the referents of Ursino in Turin.
edges.evidence_quote: Nel capoluogo torinese i loro referenti sono i Belfiore

descriptions: Ursino is allied with Cordì.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Ursino sono una potente 'ndrina di Gioiosa Jonica , alleata degli Aquino di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica e dei Cordì di Locri

descriptions: Ursino and Ierinò were in conflict in the second Gioiosa Jonica feud.
edges.evidence_quote: Seconda faida di Gioiosa Jonica, stavolta fra gli Ursino e gli Ierinò , alla fine degli anni '80.

descriptions: Ursino and Jerinò were in a feud between 1987 and 1991.
edges.evidence_quote: scoppia una faida a Gioiosa Jonica fra gli Ursino e gli Jerinò

descriptions: Ursino sided with the Imerti-Condello-Serraino-Di Giovine-Rosmini faction in the second 'Ndrangheta war.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Ursino nella seconda guerra di 'Ndrangheta si schierarono insieme ai Macrì con la fazione Imerti - Condello - Serraino - Di Giovine - Rosmini

descriptions: Ursino participated in port construction with Mazzaferro in the 1970s.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni Settanta hanno partecipato alla costruzione del Porto di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Mazzaferro

descriptions: Ursino is allied with Aquino.
edges.evidence_quote: Gli Ursino sono una potente 'ndrina di Gioiosa Jonica , alleata degli Aquino di Marina di Gioiosa Jonica

descriptions: Ursino and Macrì are related and often operate together as Ursino-Macrì.
edges.evidence_quote: Renato Macrì, nipote degli Ursino ed elemento di spicco dell’omonimo clan

descriptions: Clan dei Catanesi sold drugs to their Calabrian allies, the Ursino.
edges.evidence_quote: I Miano si rifornivano di droga ... e successivamente la rivendevano ai loro alleati calabresi, i Belfiore e gli Ursino

descriptions: Commisso cooperated with Ursino in port construction.
edges.evidence_quote: Negli anni settanta hanno partecipato alla costruzione del porto di Gioia Tauro insieme ai Mazzaferro e agli Ursino.

descriptions: Commisso (via Ursino-Macrì) allied with Sgambellone for drug trafficking.
edges.evidence_quote: nel febbraio 2002 si scopre ... la presenza di affiliati agli Ursino -Macrì e si alleano con la 'ndrina (cosca) Sgambellone

descriptions: A Gambino associate conspired with a member of the Ursino clan to set up a drug network.
edges.evidence_quote: US Attorney Loretta Lynch singled out Gambino family associate Franco Lupoi as the linchpin of the operation, accusing him of conspiring with his father-in-law, Nicola Antonio Simonetta, a member of the Ursino clan, to set up the network.

descriptions: The Errol Flynns are recognized as the precursors to these successor gangs.
edges.evidence_quote: Some of the most notable successors include the "Be Like Boys", "Dexter Boys" (an offshoot of YBI), "Schoolcraft Boys or SCB's", "SNS", "Fenkell Boys", "FMK" ("Fenkell Mafia Killers"), "7 Mile Killers or 7 Mile Dogs", "Linwood Boys", "Brewster Boys", "Jeffries Boys", and "8 Mile sconys", ("JBFL") "Joy Boys" or "Exit 9" All of these crews, excepting the "Be Like Boys" gang, are named after Detroit city streets or housing projects and some of these gangs still exist under new leadership.

descriptions: Frente Democrático Anticomunista y Antiterrorista continued the practices of la 42.
edges.evidence_quote: the Frente Democrático Anticomunista y Antiterrorista , also known as La Banda Colorá , continued the practices of la 42

descriptions: Libya Shield Force is listed as an opponent of Islamic State.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... Libya Shield Force

'Ndrina Araniti.description: The 'Ndrina Araniti is a historical and powerful clan of the 'Ndrangheta in Calabria, operating in Sambatello, Reggio Calabria. According to the 'Sistema Reggio' operation, they are one of five 'ndrine with absolute monopoly over commercial and economic activities in Reggio Calabria. The clan has been involved in criminal activities for over 50 years, including extortion, kidnapping, usury, money laundering, and public contract fraud. Members have been arrested in various operations, and assets worth millions of euros have been seized.

descriptions: Araniti is a 'ndrina (sub-unit) of the 'Ndrangheta.
edges.evidence_quote: La 'ndrina Araniti è una storica e potente cosca malavitosa della 'ndrangheta calabrese

descriptions: Barreca had a close personal and ritual alliance with Araniti.
edges.evidence_quote: Barreca had his son baptized by the capobastone of the Araniti 'ndrina, Santo Araniti. In 1979, Barreca received the "santista" rank from Araniti himself.

descriptions: Facchineri allied with Mercuri-Ferraro in San Giorgio Morgeto.
edges.evidence_quote: A San Giorgio Morgeto i Facchineri si alleano con i Valente (Giffone)-Mercuri-Ferraro (Melicucco) e poi con i Sorbara (San Giorgio) e i Ladini (Cinquefrondi)

descriptions: Infobox lists Insane Gangster Satan Disciples Nation as a rival.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Gangster Two-Six Nation , Almighty Ambrose Nation , Insane Gangster Satan Disciples Nation , Insane Two-Two Boys Nation

Red Devils Motorcycle Club.description: The Red Devils Motorcycle Club is an international 1% outlaw motorcycle club and the principal support club of the Hells Angels. Founded in Karlstad, Sweden in 2001, it has chapters in nearly 20 countries. Known as the most elite and violent Hells Angels support group, it engages in drug and gun trafficking, murders, and other violent crimes. The club is often called the 'Death Patrol' in the biker scene.

descriptions: Bandidos consider Red Devils as rivals in Australia.
edges.evidence_quote: while their rivals include the Comancheros, Finks, Gypsy Jokers, Hells Angels, Mongols, Notorious, Rebels and Red Devils

descriptions: The text lists the Red Devils as rivals of the Bandidos.
edges.evidence_quote: while their rivals include the Comancheros , Finks , Gypsy Jokers , Hells Angels , Mongols , Notorious , Rebels and Red Devils

descriptions: Bandidos consider Red Devils as rivals.
edges.evidence_quote: while their rivals include the ... Red Devils

descriptions: Red Devils is listed as an ally of Gate Keepers in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels, Red Devils Motorcycle Club

descriptions: Red Devils is the official support club of Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: The Red Devils Motorcycle Club, a biker group with chapters in nearly 20 countries, is the official and most prominent support club of the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Red Devils are affiliated with Hells Angels and jointly attacked Vikings and Wargs.
edges.evidence_quote: On 7 November 2018, members of the Hells Angels' Slough chapter and the affiliated Red Devils ambushed six members of the Vikings and their support group the Wargs Brotherhood.

descriptions: Red Devils are allied with Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: On 4 October 2009, several Hells Angels and allied Red Devils performed a raid on an Outlaws clubhouse in Kortrijk.

descriptions: Red Devils MC is a support club for Hells Angels, a structural tie.
edges.evidence_quote: The support club Red Devils MC Cologne was also banned.

descriptions: Red Devils is a puppet club of Hells Angels.
edges.evidence_quote: brothers Daniel and Ben Pegoraro, both members of Hells Angels puppet club the Red Devils

descriptions: Red Devils allied with Hells Angels raided Outlaws clubhouse.
edges.evidence_quote: On 4 October 2009, several Hells Angels and allied Red Devils performed a raid on an Outlaws clubhouse in Kortrijk.

descriptions: Red Devils MC is involved in a dispute with Bandidos as part of Hells Angels' rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: It is speculated that the ambush had to do with an ongoing dispute between the Hells Angels and the Bandidos Motorcycle Club.

descriptions: Red Devils MC is the principal support club of Hells Angels, working to protect them and do their 'dirty work'.
edges.evidence_quote: The Red Devils Motorcycle Club ( RDMC ) is an international 1% outlaw motorcycle club and the principal support club of the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Red Devils MC engaged in a gun battle with Infamous Ryders.
edges.evidence_quote: On March 19, 2022, Red Devils and Hells Angels bikers were involved in a gun battle with members of the Infamous Ryders and La Familia motorcycle clubs.

descriptions: A Red Devils MC member assaulted a member of the Outlaws MC, indicating conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: Matthew Quattrociocchi, a member of the Red Devils MC Hamilton Charter, was charged with assault and possession of a weapon in June 2020 after he had beat a member of the rival Outlaws Motorcycle Club with a baseball bat.

descriptions: Red Devils, as Hells Angels support club, have had incidents with Rock Machine.
edges.evidence_quote: the Red Devils are the official support club of the Hells Angels, they have had several incidents with the Rock Machine.

edges.source: Ejército Revolucionario Popular Antisubversivo de Colombia
descriptions: ERPAC was at war with Los Macacos and defeated them in 2008.
edges.evidence_quote: El ERPAC estuvo en guerra con 'Los Macacos' a quienes derrotó en 2008

descriptions: AQAP was formed by merging al-Qaeda in Yemen and al-Qaeda in Saudi Arabia.
edges.evidence_quote: Established in 2009 as a merger between al-Qaeda in Yemen and al-Qaeda in Saudi Arabia

descriptions: AQAP was formed by the merger of al-Qaeda in Yemen and al-Qaeda in Saudi Arabia.
edges.evidence_quote: Established in 2009 as a merger between al-Qaeda in Yemen and al-Qaeda in Saudi Arabia

descriptions: Khilafat Afghan merged into ISIS–K in January 2015.
edges.evidence_quote: These groups were Tehrik-e-Khilafat Khorasan (TKK), Khilafat Afghan and Muslim Dost's group, Azizullah Haqqani's group, and Tehrik-e-Khilafat Pakistan (TKP)

descriptions: Khilafat Afghan merged to form ISIS–K.
edges.evidence_quote: ISIS–K, when it was officially declared in January 2015, was the product of the merger of Tehrik-e Khilafat Khorasan (TKK), Khilafat Afghan, Muslim Dost's group, Azizullah Haqqani's group, and Tehrik-e Khilafat Pakistan (TKP)

Shapiro Brothers.description: The Shapiro Brothers were a group of Jewish-American mobsters from New York City, based in Williamsburg, who led a faction in the garment industry. They were involved in a violent conflict with Jacob Shapiro and Louis Buchalter for control of the industry in Brooklyn. All three brothers were killed by rivals between 1931 and 1934.

descriptions: Murder, Inc. killed Willie Shapiro on orders from Buchalter, indicating a conflict between the Shapiro Brothers and Murder, Inc.
edges.evidence_quote: On orders from Buchalter, Willie was killed by Murder, Inc. members Martin "Bugsy" Goldstein and Abe "Kid Twist" Reles

Kodo-kai.description: The Kodo-kai is a yakuza criminal organization based in Nagoya, Japan, founded in 1984 by Shinobu Tsukasa. It is a secondary organization of the Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi, the largest yakuza syndicate in Japan, with an estimated membership of 4,000. The Kodo-kai is known for its defiant attitude toward police and its involvement in banking, real estate, securities, and show business. It is considered by the National Police Agency to be more like a mafia-type or terrorist organization.

descriptions: Kodo-kai succeeded Hirota-gumi after its disbandment.
edges.evidence_quote: Shinobu Tsukasa formed the Kodo-kai as the successor to the Hirota-gumi

descriptions: Fukushima Rengo is listed as an ally of Kodo-kai in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Seibu Rengo, Komatsu-gumi, Koike-gumi, Fukushima Rengo, Jido-kai, Omi-ikka

descriptions: Kodo-kai is the successor to Hirota-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Following the disbanding of the Hirota-gumi, he founded the Kodo-kai with Kiyoshi Takayama among others in 1984 as the successor to the Hirota-gumi.

descriptions: Jido-kai is listed as an ally of Kodo-kai in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Seibu Rengo, Komatsu-gumi, Koike-gumi, Fukushima Rengo, Jido-kai, Omi-ikka

descriptions: Koike-gumi is listed as an ally of Kodo-kai in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Seibu Rengo, Komatsu-gumi, Koike-gumi, Fukushima Rengo, Jido-kai, Omi-ikka

descriptions: Komatsu-gumi is listed as an ally of Kodo-kai in the infobox.

descriptions: Omi-ikka is listed as an ally of Kodo-kai in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Seibu Rengo, Komatsu-gumi, Koike-gumi, Fukushima Rengo, Jido-kai, Omi-ikka

descriptions: Seibu Rengo is listed as an ally of Kodo-kai in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Seibu Rengo, Komatsu-gumi, Koike-gumi, Fukushima Rengo, Jido-kai, Omi-ikka

descriptions: Kodo-kai is a branch of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Under Shinoda and his long-term partner Takayama, the Kodo-kai was a successful branch of the Yamaguchi-Gumi

descriptions: Kodo-kai is a subordinate group within the Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: It is a secondary organization of the Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Kodo-kai is a ruling faction within Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Goto began disappearing from the yakuza scene in 2008 after allegedly being forced into retirement by the Kobe headquarters' ruling faction led by Kiyoshi Takayama of the Kodo-kai.

descriptions: Yamaken-gumi is a major internal rival of Kodo-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Yamaken-gumi had been a major internal rival of the Kodo-kai

descriptions: Kodo-kai is a ruling affiliate of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: the president of its ruling affiliate, Kodo-kai

descriptions: Kodo-kai is a subgroup within Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: the sixth era headed by Shinobu Tsukasa from the Kodo-kai of Nagoya

descriptions: Kodo-kai is a sub-group or faction within Yamaguchi-gumi, as its chief is the number two of Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Yamaguchi-gumi's number two and Kodo-kai chief Kiyoshi Takayama was arrested in late 2010.

descriptions: Kodo-kai is a subsidiary family within Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.evidence_quote: Kiyoshi Takayama, kumichō of the Kodo-kai, was elected as wakagashira
